samples.xml_description:
<module id="asyn_fifo">
    <description>Asynchronous FIFO</description>
    <ports>
      <input id="wclk">Write clock signal used for synchronous write operations.</input>
      <input id="rclk">Read clock signal used for synchronous read operations.</input>
      <input id="wrstn">Write reset signal. Defined as 0 for reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
      <input id="rrstn">Read reset signal. Defined as 0 for reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
      <input id="winc">Write increment signal. Used to trigger write operations.</input>
      <input id="rinc">Read increment signal. Used to trigger read operations.</input>
      <input id="wdata">Write data input. The width [WIDTH-1:0] is configurable and represents the data to be written into the FIFO.</input>
      <output id="wfull">Write full signal. Indicates if the FIFO is full and cannot accept further write operations.</output>
      <output id="rempty">Read empty signal. Indicates if the FIFO is empty and cannot provide any data for read operations.</output>
      <output id="rdata">Read data output. The width [WIDTH-1:0] is configurable and represents the data read from the FIFO.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
      <param name="WIDTH">8</param>
      <param name="DEPTH">16</param>
    </parameter_description>
    
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        // Your logic here
        reg [3:0] raddr;
        reg [3:0] waddr;
        
        wire [3:0] waddr_bin;
        wire [3:0] raddr_bin;
        wire [3:0] wptr;
        wire [3:0] rptr;
        
        //wire [3:0] wptr_buff;
        //wire [3:0] rptr_buff;
        
        //reg [3:0] wptr_buff;
        //reg [3:0] rptr_buff;
        
        wire [3:0] wptr_syn;
        wire [3:0] rptr_syn;
        
        reg wen,ren;
        
        assign wfull = (wptr == {~rptr[3], rptr[2:0]});
        assign rempty = (wptr_syn == rptr);
        
        always@(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn) begin
            if(!wrstn)begin
                waddr <= 4'h0;
            end else begin
                if(winc && !wfull)begin
                    waddr <= waddr + 1'b1;
                end
            end
        end
        
        always@(posedge rclk or negedge rrstn) begin
            if(!rrstn)begin
                raddr <= 4'h0;
            end else begin
                if(rinc && !rempty)begin
                    raddr <= raddr + 1'b1;
                end
            end
        end
        
        assign waddr_bin=waddr ^ (waddr >> 1);
        assign raddr_bin=raddr ^ (raddr >> 1);
        
        assign wptr[3]=waddr_bin[3];
        assign wptr[2]=waddr_bin[2]^waddr_bin[3];
        assign wptr[1]=waddr_bin[1]^waddr_bin[2];
        assign wptr[0]=waddr_bin[0]^waddr_bin[1];
        
        
        assign rptr[3]=raddr_bin[3];
        assign rptr[2]=raddr_bin[2]^raddr_bin[3];
        assign rptr[1]=raddr_bin[1]^raddr_bin[2];
        assign rptr[0]=raddr_bin[0]^raddr_bin[1];
        
        //assign wptr_syn=wptr_buff;
        //assign rptr_syn=rptr_buff;
        
        /*
        always@(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn) begin
            if(!wrstn)begin
                wptr_buff<=4'h0;
            end else begin
                wptr_buff<=wptr;
            end
        end
        
        
        always@(posedge rclk or negedge rrstn) begin
            if(!rrstn)begin
                rptr_buff<=4'h0;
            end else begin
                rptr_buff<=rptr;
            end
        end
        */
        
        always@(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn) begin
            if(!wrstn)begin
                wen<=1'b0;
            end else begin
                wen<=(winc&&(~wfull));
            end
        end
        
        
        always@(posedge rclk or negedge rrstn) begin
            if(!rrstn)begin
                ren<=1'b0;
            end else begin
                ren<=(rinc&&(~rempty));
            end
        end
        
        always@(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn) begin
            if(!wrstn)begin
                waddr<=4'h0;
            end else begin
                if(wen==1'b1)begin
                    waddr<waddr+1'b1;
                end
            end
        end
        
        always@(posedge rclk or negedge rrstn) begin
            if(!rrstn)begin
                raddr<=4'h0;
            end else begin
                if(ren==1'b1)begin
                    raddr<raddr+1'b1;
                end
            end
        end
        
        assign wptr_syn=waddr;
        assign rptr_syn=raddr;
        
    </logic_description>
    
    
    <implementation>Instantiation dual port ram module to use in asynch fifo</implementation>
    
    <task>
    </task>
    
</module>
